narrative:
Ravenna Township has 5,627 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
